generated_oml:
instance ExternalDS18S20Sensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring external temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ExternalTemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance InternalDS18S20Sensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTemperatureDataTransmitted1
]

instance InternalDS18S20Sensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal temperature with ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InternalTemperatureDataTransmitted2
]

instance ExternalTemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalDS18S20Sensor
]

instance InternalTemperatureDataTransmitted1 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalDS18S20Sensor1
]

instance InternalTemperatureDataTransmitted2 : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom InternalDS18S20Sensor2
]

instance ExternalTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from external DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ExternalTemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQMessageBroker, RaspberryPiController, ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance InternalTemperatureData1 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from first internal DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTemperatureDataTransmitted1
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQMessageBroker, RaspberryPiController, ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance InternalTemperatureData2 : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from second internal DS18S20 sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InternalTemperatureDataTransmitted2
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQMessageBroker, RaspberryPiController, ScipyCalibrationTool
]

instance ThermalModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Energy balance model between air and environment with 2 parameters"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool, RabbitMQMessageBroker
]

instance ThermalModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal model including heatbed thermal inertia with 4 parameters"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ScipyCalibrationTool, RabbitMQMessageBroker
]

instance RabbitMQMessageBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between physical sensors and digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeTemperaturePrediction, FaultDetection
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Controller software running on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B handling GPIO operations for sensors and actuators"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeTemperaturePrediction, FaultDetection, ParameterCalibration
]

instance ScipyCalibrationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Scipy Python package for non-linear least squares optimization of thermal models"
    DTDFVocab:enables ParameterCalibration
]

instance RealTimeTemperaturePrediction : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature prediction using calibrated thermal models (Model A with 2 parameters, Model B with 4 parameters)"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePredictionInsight
]

instance FaultDetection : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection via safety monitoring of temperature deviations and triggering automatic adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, BangBangControllerDecision
]

instance ParameterCalibration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Parameter calibration using non-linear least squares optimization for model accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedModelInsight
]

instance TemperaturePredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values used for bang-bang controller decisions (LL, UL, H, C parameters)"
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected temperature deviations beyond safe limits for safety monitoring"
]

instance CalibratedModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated thermal models with optimized parameters for accurate prediction"
]

instance BangBangControllerDecision : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of heatbed and fan based on temperature predictions and safety violations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "214×214×3 mm heatbed actuated via MOSFETs and optocouplers for heating"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "0.02 m³/s airflow fan actuated via MOSFETs and optocouplers for cooling"
]

instance RaspberryPiHardware : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B hardware controller"
]

instance PCBDesign : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers designed to handle up to 4A current for heatbed operation"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply unit for the thermal incubator system"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ volume) thermal incubator system"
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, ExternalDS18S20Sensor, InternalDS18S20Sensor1, InternalDS18S20Sensor2, RaspberryPiHardware, PCBDesign, PowerSupply
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan speed adjustments) generated by the controller are sent via RabbitMQ to the low-level driver, which interfaces with the PCB's MOSFETs to actuate the heatbed and fan."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated components including RabbitMQ server (hosted on Raspberry Pi), low-level driver, controller, with data flow between PT sensors/actuators and DT components via RabbitMQ message broker."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, as the DT integrates models to monitor and predict behavior of the deployed physical system under current operating conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Models validated by comparing predictions with experimental data; Model B better captured thermal inertia. Temperature uniformity tested with sensor placement, showing max discrepancy of 7°C (12V fan) and 6°C (18V fan)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for data exchange between PT and DT components, with communication via message queues for synchronization."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server and controller software hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B, with low-level driver and communication server running locally on the same device."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol incorporated into the low-level driver to maintain device safety; temperature control limits (LL, UL) implemented in the controller to prevent overheating and ensure operational safety."
]
